name: microsoft-authentication-library-for-python
description: Microsoft Authentication Library (MSAL) for Python makes it easy to authenticate to Microsoft Entra ID. General docs are available here https://learn.microsoft.com/entra/msal/python/ Stable APIs are documented here https://msal-python.readthedocs.io. Questions can be asked on www.stackoverflow.com with tag "msal" + "python".
description_ja: Microsoft Authentication Library (MSAL) for Python は Microsoft Entra ID への認証を容易にします。一般ドキュメントは https://learn.microsoft.com/entra/msal/python/、安定版 API のドキュメントは https://msal-python.readthedocs.io、質問は stackoverflow.com で「msal」+「python」タグを使用してください。
